PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"git (commit|merge)|git (commit|merge)"'; then npx gitnexus analyze 2>/dev/null || true; fi

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.env'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit .env files directly — ask the user to update environment variables manually.' && exit 1; fi
